anchor.host_performance_prompt: Photorealistic cyberpunk newsroom broadcast with a believable elf anchor, natural skin detail, subtle head movement, realistic mouth movement, professional desk posture, and no watermark.

voice.pace: medium-slow for headlines, faster for bulletin detail

episode.public_safe_summary: The city moved first. Matrix pressure rises near a research site. The record stays public-safe.
episode.title: Turn 1: The City Moved First

broll_cues.prompt: High-end cinematic geoscape insert with faction pressure pulses, route arcs, heat bars, and source receipt markers.
broll_cues.public_safety_notes: No private map overlays, no false product claims, no licensed real-world map texture.

broll_cues.prompt: Photorealistic rainy cyberpunk city block at night with patrol lights, puddle reflections, and restrained street movement.
broll_cues.public_safety_notes: Atmosphere only; no private player identities or readable copyrighted text.

segments.headline: The city moved first.
script_lines: Good evening. The Black Ledger moved again.
Turn 1 closed with a visible pressure shift, one faction losing quiet ground, and a signal trail that did not stay buried.

broll_cues.prompt: Photorealistic public-safe reconstruction of a research facility exterior at night during a security incident.
broll_cues.public_safety_notes: No logos, no floorplans, no private GM map details.

broll_cues.prompt: Photorealistic cyberpunk operations room with a decker tracing a signal across translucent screens.
broll_cues.public_safety_notes: Abstract node graphs only; no sourcebook text or private campaign topology.

segments.headline: Matrix pressure rises near a research site.
script_lines: The loudest signal came from a research-site breach.
The public record shows Matrix pressure rising, but the private table details stay sealed.

broll_cues.prompt: Close cinematic newsroom globe insert with controlled amber alert bars and a final receipt-backed signoff composition.
broll_cues.public_safety_notes: Editorial graphic only; no hidden evidence revealed.

segments.headline: The record stays public-safe.
segments.lower_third: BLACK LEDGER | THE CITY REPORTS BACK
script_lines: The private fallout stays with the tables that earned it.

watch_page_contract.public_disclosure: Some visuals are public-safe reconstructions generated from Chummer receipts. Private table details stay private.
